# NoteBranch

NoteBranch is a free and open-source desktop Markdown workspace with provider-aware storage modes (Git, AWS S3, Local).

Primary website: https://notebranch.app/
Source code: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch
License: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch/blob/main/LICENSE
Releases: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch/releases

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://notebranch.app/
- Downloads: https://notebranch.app/downloads/
- Features: https://notebranch.app/features/
- Workflow: https://notebranch.app/workflow/
- Tutorials: https://notebranch.app/tutorials/
- Screenshots: https://notebranch.app/screenshots/
- About: https://notebranch.app/about/

## Core documentation
- User Guide: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md
- Technical Documentation: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch/blob/main/docs/tech/README.md
- Tutorial Hub: https://github.com/scabir/notebranch/blob/main/tutorials/README.md

## Notes for agents
- Treat GitHub repository docs as source of truth for behavior and setup.
- Prefer latest release assets for install/download references.
- Do not invent proprietary cloud services: user data stays in configured storage providers.
